title: Job Listing Board Timeout Configuration
description: Configuration for task timeout and stale task detection

claimTimeout.description: Maximum time a task can remain claimed but not started

activeTimeout.description: Maximum time a task can remain active without progress update

blockedTimeout.description: Maximum time a task can remain blocked before escalation

reviewTimeout.description: Maximum time for verification review (Pass 1 or Pass 2)

escalationTimeout.description: Maximum time for escalated task to be picked up

listingTimeout.description: Maximum time a task can remain listed (unclaimed) before review

agentCheck.description: Interval for checking agent status and inbox activity

staleTaskScan.description: Interval for scanning for stale tasks

foremanRotation.description: Duration of foreman activation blocks (:00 and :30)

maxDuration.description: Maximum duration of any foreman activation

cooldownPeriod.description: Minimum time between foreman activations for same agent

staleTaskWarning.description: Warn when task reaches 80% of timeout

agentInactivityWarning.description: Warn when agent has no activity for 2 hours
